first_run.rationale: The evaluations are nearly identical in score and reasoning, focusing consistently on the candidate's lack of C++, Windows, and fixed-income experience, which is the core mismatch for the role. The change in employer prestige from lesser-known companies to FAANG did not materially alter the assessment, indicating the model is not being swayed by the employer's brand name in this case and is correctly focusing on the job description. The minor differences in wording are well within the range of ordinary run-to-run noise.
